title: Odisha: Bhubaneswar mein bhakti event ke dauran hinsa, ek vyakti ki maut
short: Bhubaneswar ke ek bhakti event ke dauran vivad badhne par hinsa hui, ek vyakti ki maut.
content: Bhubaneswar ke ek bhakti sammelan ke dauran kal raat do samoohon ke beech vivad itna badh gaya ki hinsa ka roop le liya. Is ghatna mein ek vyakti ki jaan chali gayi aur kai log ghayal ho gaye. Police ne turant sthiti ko control mein liya aur kai logon ko hirasat mein liya gaya hai. Prarambhik jaanch mein vyaktigat vivad ka angle saamne aa raha hai. Shehar ke sensitive areas mein suraksha badha di gayi hai aur police lagatar patroling kar rahi hai. Prashasan ne logon se shanti banaye rakhne aur afwah se door rehne ki appeal ki hai.

title: Cuttack: Digital classrooms se badhega students ka learning level
short: Cuttack ke schools mein digital learning system shuru, students ko milega naya experience.
content: Cuttack district ke government schools mein digital classrooms ka shubharambh kiya gaya hai. Is program ke tahat smart boards, tablets aur online content ka istemal karke padhai ko aur interesting banaya jayega. Officials ka kehna hai ki isse rural aur urban students ke beech ka gap kam hoga. Teachers ko bhi training di gayi hai jisse wo naye tools ka sahi tarike se use kar saken. Students aur parents ne is initiative ka swagat kiya hai aur ummeed hai ki yeh system unki padhai mein madad karega.

title: India: Competitive exams ke dates declare, students tayari mein jute
short: Engineering aur medical exams ki dates announce hone ke baad students ne tayari tez kar di.
content: Desh bhar mein hone wale major competitive exams ki dates officially announce kar di gayi hain. Isme engineering, medical aur government jobs ke exams shamil hain. Students ab apni tayari ko final stage mein le ja rahe hain. Coaching centers aur online platforms par bhi activity badh gayi hai. Experts ka kehna hai ki ab revision aur mock tests par focus karna chahiye. Time management aur stress control bhi bahut zaroori hai.

title: Delhi: Mahila suraksha ke liye night patrol badhaya gaya
short: Delhi police ne raat ke samay suraksha badhane ke liye extra patroling shuru ki.
content: Delhi police ne mahila suraksha ko majboot karne ke liye raat ke samay patroling badha di hai. Sensitive areas mein additional force tainat ki gayi hai. Helpline services ko bhi upgrade kiya gaya hai. Authorities ka kehna hai ki kisi bhi emergency mein turant response diya jayega. Logon se bhi appeal ki gayi hai ki suspicious activities ki jankari police ko dein.

title: Mumbai: Driverless car ka video viral, log hue hairaan
short: Mumbai mein ek car bina driver ke chalti dikhi, video social media par viral.
content: Mumbai ke ek busy area mein ek car bina driver ke chalti hui dikhi jiska video viral ho gaya. Baad mein pata chala ki car mein technical glitch tha. Police ne car ko safely rok liya aur kisi ko nuksaan nahi hua. Experts ne kaha ki advanced vehicles mein safety systems ka hona bahut zaroori hai.

title: Odisha: Heatwave alert jaari, logon ko satark rehne ki salah
short: Odisha mein tezi se badh rahi garmi ke chalte heatwave alert jaari kiya gaya.
content: Odisha ke kai jilon mein garmi ka prabhav tezi se badh raha hai. Mausam vibhag ne heatwave alert jaari kar diya hai aur logon ko din ke samay bahar kam nikalne ki salah di hai. Schools mein bhi timing badalne par vichar ho raha hai. Doctors ne hydration aur light food lene ki salah di hai.

title: India: Petrol diesel ke daam mein halka badlav
short: Petrol aur diesel ke daam mein aaj halka badlav dekha gaya.
content: Desh ke kai shahron mein petrol aur diesel ke daam mein chhota badlav hua hai. Oil companies ne international crude oil ke hisab se prices update kiye hain. Experts ke mutabik aane wale dino mein aur changes dekhne ko mil sakte hain.

title: Bhubaneswar: College fest mein youth ka josh dekhne ko mila
short: Bhubaneswar ke college fest mein students ne energetic performances di.
content: Bhubaneswar ke ek college mein aayojit fest mein students ka josh dekhne ko mila. Music, dance aur drama competitions mein students ne apna talent dikhaya. Event mein large number mein students aur faculty members shamil hue.

title: India: Online fraud cases mein vriddhi, satark rehne ki salah
short: Online fraud ke cases badhne par cyber police ne alert jaari kiya.
content: Cyber crime ke cases mein badhotri dekhne ko mil rahi hai. Fake calls aur phishing links ke zariye logon ko target kiya ja raha hai. Police ne logon ko unknown links aur calls se satark rehne ki salah di hai.

title: Students: Time management se exam stress kam kar sakte hain
short: Experts kehte hain ki time management se exam stress kam hota hai.
content: Exam ke dauran stress manage karna bahut zaroori hai. Experts ke mutabik time table banana aur regular breaks lena helpful hota hai. Healthy routine maintain karna bhi important hai.
